# Preparing biodiversity data for conversion {#sec-preparing}

*Learning objectives: structure raster outputs and metadata so they're ready for `ebv_create()`/`ebv_add_data()`.*

## What `ebv_create()` needs

<!-- TODO -->

## Revisiting the four dimensions, as a producer

<!-- TODO: adapt core-concepts.qmd "Scenarios, metrics and the group hierarchy", from the producer's point of view -->

## Pre-flight checklist

<!-- TODO: aligned rasters, naming scheme, fill value/units decisions, entity/taxonomy CSV -->

## Downloading dataset 30 for a full worked example

<!-- TODO: ebv_download() or manual download from https://portal.geobon.org/ebv-detail?id=30 (3.27 MB), then ebv_properties()/ebv_datacubepaths() to inspect its scenario/metric/entity structure -->

## Building the metadata JSON

<!-- TODO: adapt advanced-usage.qmd "Step 1 — the metadata JSON" -->

**Checkpoint:** aligned rasters (or bundled example tifs), an entities list, and a metadata JSON in hand.
